item.title: (no title)
item.content:encoded: I love the idea of an AWCY piece telling the anartist to fuck off lmao, +1.

item.title: (no title)
item.content:encoded: Since the authorship is no longer clear from this: this skip was written by me, Tufto, on my first account prior to my deleting it. You can find more of my stuff here.

item.title: (no title)
item.content:encoded:
I think the not at the end is what really makes this one land. AWCY?'s response to the SCP makes this much more impactful than it would be without the note. Really good stuff.
+1
Edit: realized after posting this that this is my first +1 since joining the site.

item.title: (no title)
item.content:encoded:
I will never use an American spelling. Never! :p.

You are quite right about the full stop, however, will alter that.

item.title: (no title)
item.content:encoded: The only thing I didn't like about this was the fact that 'neutralised' was spelled with an s and had a period at the end. Other than that, +1

item.title: Re: Audio Adaptation
item.content:encoded: That was fantastic- thank you for doing it! I love how you did the end-note :D.

item.title: Audio Adaptation
item.content:encoded:
I love how fancy this is, and then the note stinger is amazing. I hope you enjoy this reading!

https://youtu.be/D0syXUzFLzQ

Edit: I am so glad you like it; I was worried that having the two conceptional entities chiming in would make it too garbled, so I was very careful with my timing and Erica's to make sure our syllables matched perfectly.

I honestly think that "You are not cool yet. Make better art." might be my #1 favorite line on the wiki to date, so thanks for that too.

item.title: (no title)
item.content:encoded: WOW. The first 3/4 had me meh until the note changed. That's what makes it for me. It breaks out of the AWCY mold in a really brilliant way. It's not about deconstructing what is and isn't art, which some of the most basic AWCY SCPs do, or art-gone-wrong, or even about the artist's ego run amok. It's bigger than that.

item.title: (no title)
item.content:encoded: I like to think that the fly and spider are sentience beings that can jump between bodies of flies and spiders. So they did not die but just went to another world. I also like how this shows that the art of AWCY? can just sometimes say, "Yeah this is a lame group that think they are doing something deep but aren't really."

item.title: (no title)
item.content:encoded: Tentative downvote. Something about it struck me as a little obvious, but the sentence about creating sapience not in itself constituting art (or at least not good art) almost turned it entirely around. As a rehabilitation of AWCY, I like it. Remind me sometime, and I might have to revisit my vote.

item.title: (no title)
item.content:encoded:
Huh. Neat.

Its been a while since I've enjoyed an AWCY? skip like this. The effect is pretty simple but enjoyable, and I love the dialogue between the spider and the fly during the incident report that promptly ends in the spider eating the fly.

The change in the message after the piece breaks down also was hilarious.

+1. Good job, Tufto.

item.title: (no title)
item.content:encoded:
Tufto, 7 Jul 2017:

I'll take a break after this one.

Guess what

Tufto made three scips in the span of the next week.

If only I could take a break like that.

item.title: (no title)
item.content:encoded:
"You are not cool yet. Make better art."

yep upvoted +1

incident log kinda long tho

item.title: (no title)
item.content:encoded:
Richard Hofstadter's gotten rather grim, hasn't he?

I liked this; the idea of them becoming aware of their anomalous condition was well presented.

item.title: (no title)
item.content:encoded:
The stuff about finding purpose didn't do a lot for me, but it was sufficiently charming. The sudden jump to the spider eating the fly after confessing love for each other was some good dark humor, and the modified AWCY message right after was great.

+1

item.title: (no title)
item.content:encoded:
In which Tufto tries to write about a GoI that isn't ORIA.

With thanks to:

Perelka_L
Varaxous
noxfero
Pendleton_Miller
9Volt
